title: confiture migrate up --format json
description: Result of applying pending migrations (MigrateUpResult.to_dict). The fraisier migration adapter reads applied[].version to report the new head. A failure that aborts before/within execution emits the error envelope (error-envelope.schema.json) instead of this shape; a partial failure sets success=false and lists human-readable strings in errors.

success.description: True when every pending migration applied successfully.

applied.description: Migrations applied by this operation, oldest → newest.

version.description: Version identifier of the applied migration (the adapter's head revision).

skipped.description: Versions already applied before this operation (no-op for them).

skipped_superuser.description: Migrations halted because they declared requires_superuser=True (issue #137).

pending.description: Versions left unapplied (e.g. everything after a superuser halt).

errors.description: Human-readable failure messages when success=false; empty in the happy path.

total_duration_ms.description: Total apply time in milliseconds across all migrations.

checksums_verified.description: True when all previously-applied migration checksums verified before applying.

dry_run.description: True when this was a no-SQL dry-run analysis.

dry_run_execute.description: True when SQL was executed inside a SAVEPOINT then rolled back (nothing persisted).

warnings.description: Non-fatal warning messages; empty if none.
